candidate_summary: Forensic-entomology-inspired hallucination detection: deploy a panel of stage-specific detectors (entity-fabrication, attribute-binding, citation/date, snowball-cascade) whose firing pattern mirrors arthropod guild succession on a corpse, used to localize the post-error interval (PEI) along the LLM generation trajectory.
hit_rule: hit = kw>=2 OR cos>=0.7 OR judge>=0.7

results.title: Detecting LLM Fact-conflicting Hallucinations Enhanced by Temporal-logic-based Reasoning (Drowzee)
results.judge_reason: Drowzee detects fact-conflicting hallucinations via temporal logic on facts but does not deploy a stage-bound ensemble keyed to generation-pipeline failure modes nor localize a post-error interval; it is single-method, not forensic-stratigraphic.

results.title: Large Language Models Hallucination: A Comprehensive Survey
results.judge_reason: Survey enumerates and taxonomizes detection/mitigation methods as parallel categories but does not propose using their joint firing pattern as a temporal stratigraphy to localize when in generation the error arose.

results.title: A Survey on Hallucination in LLMs: Definitions, Detection, and Mitigation
results.judge_reason: Survey explicitly treats detection methods as parallel alternatives — the opposite of the candidate's stage-bound ensemble proposal — and contains no PEI-localization concept.

results.title: Edinburgh NLP awesome-hallucination-detection (repo of papers)
results.judge_reason: A bare paper list of hallucination-detection works; no methodology proposed, no stage-bound ensemble or PEI-localization scheme.

results.title: From Illusion to Insight: Taxonomic Survey of Hallucination Mitigation Techniques in LLMs
results.judge_reason: Mentions multi-stage mitigation frameworks, which is adjacent, but the candidate's novelty is using detector firing pattern as forensic temporal stratigraphy for PEI estimation — that specific reading is absent.

results.title: Hallucination paper ICLR 2026 (multi-stage detection)
results.judge_reason: Closest neighbor — discusses multi-stage cascade verification, which is conceptually adjacent, but does not propose reading the pattern of which detectors fire as a forensic-stratigraphic signal for localizing the generation step where the hallucination crystallized.

results.title: Forensic entomology (Wikipedia)
results.judge_reason: Pure source-domain description with no connection to LLM hallucination detection; serves only as the biological analogy reference.

results.title: FlyTracks and SmellPrints: Necrophagous Insect Behavior + VOCs (ACS Omega 2025)
results.judge_reason: Source-domain forensic-entomology paper on insect behavior and VOC chemistry — no LLM/AI/hallucination-detection content at all.

verdict: The three hits trigger only on loose keyword overlap (the generic phrase 'hallucination detection'); judge scores are uniformly low (<=0.45) and no result proposes a stage-bound detector ensemble whose firing pattern functions as forensic temporal stratigraphy to localize a post-error interval. The candidate's specific PEI-localization framing appears genuinely novel within this result set.
